name: Postpartum Recovery Gift Box
description: A curated wellness box for new moms recovering from childbirth. Includes peri-bottle, herbal sitz bath soak, nipple balm, comfort tea sachets, and a cotton robe. Designed to feel like a hug after a hard day.

name: Ergonomic Nursing Pillow
description: Curved memory-foam pillow that wraps around the waist to support baby during breastfeeding or bottle feeds. Removable, machine-washable cover. Reduces back and shoulder strain.

name: Soft Cloth Activity Book
description: Crinkle-paper cloth book with high-contrast pages, mirrors, teether ring, and textured tags. Encourages tactile exploration during tummy time and is fully washable.

name: Silicone Teething Toy Set (3 pcs)
description: Set of three food-grade silicone teethers shaped like fruits. Freezer-safe to soothe sore gums. BPA, PVC and phthalate free. Easy for tiny hands to grip.

name: Wooden Stacking Rings Toy
description: Classic wooden stacking ring tower in non-toxic vegetable dyes. Supports hand-eye coordination, color recognition and problem solving. A timeless Montessori-style toy.

name: Musical Activity Play Gym
description: Padded play mat with detachable arches, hanging plush toys, mirror, and a soft musical piano panel. Encourages reaching, kicking, and tummy time milestones.

name: Ergonomic Baby Carrier
description: Four-position ergonomic carrier with lumbar support and a built-in hip seat. Hip-healthy M-position seating for baby. Breathable mesh panel for warm climates.

name: Smart Video Baby Monitor
description: 1080p video baby monitor with two-way audio, night vision, room temperature sensor, and lullabies. Pairs with phone app over secure local network.

name: Lightweight Travel Stroller
description: One-hand fold cabin-size stroller with a five-point harness, sun canopy, and storage basket. Folds small enough for airline overhead bins.

name: Convertible High Chair
description: Six-position recline, three-position adjustable tray, and a removable insert. Converts from infant feeder to toddler chair. Wipe-clean fabric.

name: Baby Food Maker & Steamer
description: All-in-one steamer, blender, defroster, and reheater for homemade baby food. BPA-free bowl and easy-clean parts. Ready purees in under 15 minutes.

name: White Noise Sound Machine
description: Compact sound machine with 20 sounds (white noise, womb, lullabies, nature), adjustable nightlight, and a sleep timer. USB-rechargeable for travel.

name: Maternity Skincare Essentials Set
description: Pregnancy and postpartum-safe skincare set: belly oil, stretch-mark butter, and gentle cleanser. Free of retinoids, parabens, and harsh actives.

name: Baby Memory Book & Milestone Cards
description: Hardcover first-year memory book with prompts, photo slots, and 24 milestone cards. A thoughtful keepsake gift for new parents to fill together.

name: Organic Cotton Swaddle Set (3 pcs)
description: Three breathable GOTS-certified organic cotton swaddles. Multi-use as stroller cover, nursing cover, or burp cloth. Generous 120x120 cm size.

name: Diaper Backpack with Changing Pad
description: Water-resistant diaper backpack with insulated bottle pockets, a wipeable changing pad, USB charging port, and stroller straps. Unisex design.

name: Push-Along Walker Wagon
description: Sturdy wooden push-along walker with adjustable resistance for new walkers. Front storage holds blocks. Helps build confidence and balance.

name: Sippy Cup & Weaning Bowl Set
description: Silicone suction bowl, soft-spout sippy cup, and toddler spoon set. Stays put on highchair trays. Dishwasher and microwave safe.

name: Mom's Spa Day Self-Care Hamper
description: Curated at-home spa hamper: bath salts, soy candle, jade roller, herbal tea blend, and silk eye mask. A reminder that she matters too.

name: Musical Cot Mobile with Projector
description: Crib mobile with rotating plush animals, soft lullabies, and a star-night projector. Detachable music box converts to a portable soother.
